phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è la biglietteria, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH lah bee-lyeh-tteh-REE-ah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, on the right.

responses.english: On the ground floor, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il binario per Firenze, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel bee-NAH-ryoh per FEE-rehn-tseh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the monitors.

responses.english: It is indicated on the monitors.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si convalida il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see kon-VAH-lee-dah eel bee-lyeh-TTOH, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Nelle macchinette gialle vicino ai binari.
likely_response.pronunciation: NEHL-leh mahkch-ee-NEHT-teh jee-AHL-leh vee-CHEE-noh AHEE bee-NAH-ree
likely_response.translation_en: In the yellow machines near the platforms.

responses.english: In the yellow machines near the platforms.
responses.phonetic: NEHL-leh mahkch-ee-NEHT-teh jee-AHL-leh vee-CHEE-noh AHEE bee-NAH-ree
responses.french: Nelle macchinette gialle vicino ai binari.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, il deposito bagagli è aperto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh eel DEH-poh-zee-toh bah-GAH-lyee eh ah-PER-toh per FAH-voh-reh

likely_response.local: Sì, è aperto tutti i giorni.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÌ È ah-PEHR-toh TOOT-tee EE jee-OHR-nee
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, it is open every day.

responses.english: Yes, it is open every day.
responses.phonetic: SÌ È ah-PEHR-toh TOOT-tee EE jee-OHR-nee
responses.french: Sì, è aperto tutti i giorni.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto per Napoli?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAHN-toh KOH-stah eel bee-lyeh-TTOH per NAH-po-lee

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'ufficio informazioni turistiche, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH loof-FEE-choh in-for-mah-TSYOH-nee too-REE-stee-keh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the main entrance, on the left.

responses.english: At the main entrance, on the left.
